mapper.sql: id, user_id, balance, frozen_balance, total_recharge, total_consume, version, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_user_wallet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tb_user_wallet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tb_user_wallet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_wallet SET balance = balance + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE tb_user_wallet SET balance = balance + #{amount}, frozen_balance = frozen_balance - #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND frozen_balance >= #{amount} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE tb_user_wallet SET frozen_balance = frozen_balance - #{amount}, total_consume = total_consume + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND frozen_balance >= #{amount} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_user_wallet SET balance = balance + #{amount}, total_recharge = total_recharge + #{amount}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_user_wallet SET pay_password = #{payPassword}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_wallet ( user_id, balance, frozen_balance, total_recharge, total_consume, version, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE update_time = update_time
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_user_wallet
pay_password = #{payPassword}, balance = #{balance}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
